item.title: Semi Truck Blocking Bridge Construction
item.description: A stranded semi blocks active bridge construction, creating delays and requiring careful coordination to clear the site safely

media:content.media:title: Semi Truck Blocking Bridge Construction
media:content.media:description: A stranded semi blocks active bridge construction, creating delays and requiring careful coordination to clear the site safely

item.title: Semi Truck Teeters on Bridge After Crash
item.description: A semi truck left dangerously unstable after a crash requires urgent stabilization to prevent a potential fall from the bridge.

media:content.media:title: Semi Truck Teeters on Bridge After Crash
media:content.media:description: A semi truck left dangerously unstable after a crash requires urgent stabilization to prevent a potential fall from the bridge.

item.title: Truck Runs Off Road, Hits Two Cars, Nearly Hits House
item.description: A severe roadside incident escalates as a truck leaves the roadway, colliding with vehicles and narrowly avoiding a nearby house.

media:content.media:title: Truck Runs Off Road, Hits Two Cars, Nearly Hits House
media:content.media:description: A severe roadside incident escalates as a truck leaves the roadway, colliding with vehicles and narrowly avoiding a nearby house.

item.title: Can We Recover This Trailer Before It's Too Late?
item.description: A plow truck ends up in a creek, requiring careful extraction to avoid further damage and safely bring the vehicle back to stable ground.

media:content.media:title: Can We Recover This Trailer Before It's Too Late?
media:content.media:description: A plow truck ends up in a creek, requiring careful extraction to avoid further damage and safely bring the vehicle back to stable ground.

item.title: Plow Truck Recovery from a Creek
item.description: A damaged trailer situation escalates quickly, forcing a recovery team to act fast before conditions worsen or traffic becomes more dangerous.

media:content.media:title: Plow Truck Recovery from a Creek
media:content.media:description: A damaged trailer situation escalates quickly, forcing a recovery team to act fast before conditions worsen or traffic becomes more dangerous.

item.title: New Mazda Roller Edition: Median Recovery
item.description: A Mazda involved in a median incident is carefully recovered, showcasing modern towing techniques in a challenging roadside environment.

media:content.media:title: New Mazda Roller Edition: Median Recovery
media:content.media:description: A Mazda involved in a median incident is carefully recovered, showcasing modern towing techniques in a challenging roadside environment.

item.title: Loaded Semi Through Guard Rail, Rolls into Woods
item.description: A loaded semi crashes through a guard rail and ends up in the woods, creating a complex and hazardous recovery scene.

media:content.media:title: Loaded Semi Through Guard Rail, Rolls into Woods
media:content.media:description: A loaded semi crashes through a guard rail and ends up in the woods, creating a complex and hazardous recovery scene.

item.title: Dangerous Breakdown Recovery Operation
item.description: A breakdown in a dangerous location turns into a high-stakes recovery operation requiring experience, timing, and control.

media:content.media:title: Dangerous Breakdown Recovery Operation
media:content.media:description: A breakdown in a dangerous location turns into a high-stakes recovery operation requiring experience, timing, and control.

item.title: Shifting the unshiftable with 50k lbs
item.description: A 50,000-pound challenge pushes recovery equipment to its limits as operators work to move what seems impossible to shift.

media:content.media:title: Shifting the unshiftable with 50k lbs
media:content.media:description: A 50,000-pound challenge pushes recovery equipment to its limits as operators work to move what seems impossible to shift.

item.title: Towing a Loaded Gas Tanker
item.description: A loaded gas tanker requires extreme caution during towing due to the hazardous nature of its cargo and the risks involved.

media:content.media:title: Towing a Loaded Gas Tanker
media:content.media:description: A loaded gas tanker requires extreme caution during towing due to the hazardous nature of its cargo and the risks involved.

item.title: The Green Machine Is Down, Arc Nemesis Looms
item.description: A major machine failure brings operations to a halt, raising concerns about what went wrong and what comes next in the recovery process.

media:content.media:title: The Green Machine Is Down, Arc Nemesis Looms
media:content.media:description: A major machine failure brings operations to a halt, raising concerns about what went wrong and what comes next in the recovery process.

item.title: Threading the Needle in Heavy Recovery
item.description: A delicate recovery maneuver requires inch-perfect accuracy as operators “thread the needle” through tight and dangerous conditions.

media:content.media:title: Threading the Needle in Heavy Recovery
media:content.media:description: A delicate recovery maneuver requires inch-perfect accuracy as operators “thread the needle” through tight and dangerous conditions.
